headline: 今日娱乐：痴迷领跑，新片蓄势待发
headlineEn: Today's Entertainment: 'Obsession' Leads, New Films on the Horizon
summary: 今日无新片上映，但《痴迷》持续霸榜，本周《火遮眼》等新片来袭。即将上映的《奥德赛》《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》备受期待。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but 'Obsession' continues to dominate; new films like 'Fire Shade' arrive this week. Upcoming 'Odyssey' and 'Spider-Man: Fresh New Day' generate buzz.

industryHighlights.text: 今日零新片上映，市场静待周末
industryHighlights.en: Zero new releases today, market awaits weekend
